metadata.title: Profile | Slashie
metadata.description: Manage your Slashie profile, contact details, worker presence, and trust signals.

en.title: Profile & professional presence
en.description: Keep your customer profile and worker presence accurate so people know who they are hiring.
en.emptyDescription: We are preparing your account details.
en.personalDescription: Private account details and your public display name.
en.contactDescription: Visible only to you. Verification status comes from your account.
en.workerDescriptionEmpty: Create a professional profile to send quotes and appear in search.
en.workerDescription: Professional details customers see when reviewing your work.
en.workerEmptyBody: You have a customer account. Worker fields and profile-strength progress will appear after you begin setup.
en.headline: Professional headline
en.publicPreviewDescription: Owner-only preview. Private contact details and exact addresses are excluded.
en.safePublicViewBody: Customers see only your approximate service area. Email, phone, date of birth, and street address remain private.
en.privacyDescription: Control what customers can see on your public profile.
en.profilePrivateHint: Only you can view your full profile.
en.profilePublicHint: Customers can find and view your public worker profile.
en.contactStaysPrivateHint: Email, phone, and exact address never appear in the preview.

metadata.title: 個人檔案 | Slashie
metadata.description: 管理你的 Slashie 個人檔案、聯絡資料、工作者形象和信任訊號。

zh_hk.title: 個人檔案與專業形象
zh_hk.description: 保持顧客個人檔案和工作者形象準確，讓別人清楚知道正在聘請誰。
zh_hk.emptyDescription: 我們正在準備你的帳戶資料。
zh_hk.personalDescription: 私人帳戶詳情和你的公開顯示名稱。
zh_hk.contactDescription: 只供你查看。驗證狀態來自你的帳戶。
zh_hk.workerDescriptionEmpty: 建立專業個人檔案以傳送報價並出現在搜尋結果。
zh_hk.workerDescription: 顧客審視你的工作時會看到的專業資料。
zh_hk.workerEmptyBody: 你目前是顧客帳戶。開始設定後，工作者欄位和個人檔案完整度進度便會顯示。
zh_hk.headline: 專業標題
zh_hk.publicPreviewDescription: 僅帳戶擁有者可見的預覽。私人聯絡資料和詳細地址不會顯示。
zh_hk.safePublicViewBody: 顧客只會看到大約服務範圍。電郵、電話、出生日期和街道地址保持私人。
zh_hk.viewFullPublicProfile: 查看完整公開個人檔案
zh_hk.strengthDescription: 完善你的公開工作者個人檔案。
zh_hk.privacyDescription: 控制顧客在你的公開個人檔案上可以看到甚麼。
zh_hk.profilePrivateHint: 只有你可以查看完整個人檔案。
zh_hk.profilePublicHint: 顧客可以找到並查看你的公開工作者個人檔案。
zh_hk.contactStaysPrivateHint: 電郵、電話和詳細地址絕不會出現在預覽中。
